questions.prompt: A customer-approved endpoint removal is ready, but ThreatLocker Tamper Protection is enabled. What comes before uninstall?
choices: Disable Tamper Protection for the target computer through a planned maintenance action
Delete the device row from the portal
Stop the ThreatLocker service from Services.msc
Remove all policies assigned to the computer group
questions.explanation: ThreatLocker cannot be stopped or uninstalled while Tamper Protection is enabled. Disable it through the planned maintenance path before running the uninstall method.

questions.prompt: For customer offboarding, export Unified Audit and System Audit evidence before uninstalling agents and retiring policies.
questions.explanation: Evidence is easiest to collect while the control and its audit trail are intact. Export first, then remove agents, policies, notifications, and integrations.
